ValidationRule.description: Bank Sort Code Cannot contain spaces or non number charactors
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( LEN( sirenum__Payment_Sort_Code__c )>8, LEN(sirenum__Payment_Sort_Code__c )<8, CONTAINS(sirenum__Payment_Sort_Code__c , "/"), CONTAINS(sirenum__Payment_Sort_Code__c , " "), CONTAINS(sirenum__Payment_Sort_Code__c , "-") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Bank Sort Code must not contain spaces and must be 6 digits
